name: airlock
description: ngrok for AI agents — expose any HTTP agent in dev and deploy to the publisher's own cloud in prod. Monorepo root.

scripts.lint: biome lint packages examples package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml biome.json tsconfig.base.json
scripts.format: biome format --write packages examples package.json biome.json tsconfig.base.json
scripts.check: biome check packages examples package.json biome.json tsconfig.base.json
